title: I plugged Evangelion HR Giger realistic into an AI art generator The results are interesting
display_title: I plugged Evangelion HR Giger realistic into an AI art generator The results are interesting
wikitext:
[]: I plugged "Evangelion, H.R. Giger, realistic" into an AI art generator. The results are... interesting             Quote Post by Angel » Thu Dec 01, 2022 4:20 pm It mostly didn't understand the assignment, though it got close a few times. The random letters make this one look like actual movie concept art: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: I plugged "Evangelion, H.R. Giger, realistic" into an AI art generator. The results are... interesting             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Dec 01, 2022 4:22 pm Some of those looks worryingly alright at a glance

[]: More AI art, this time trying to draw live-action Rei using Evanna Lynch as a base...             Quote Post by Angel » Sat Dec 03, 2022 11:08 pm More AI art, this time trying to draw live-action Rei using Evanna Lynch as a base. Most of the results were disappointing. Many looked more like Mercy from Overwatch. A few looked like Man-Rei. Some would have looked okay if they weren't making goofy faces or if their wings were attached to their backs rather than to their heads or their boobs. These were some of the good ones: SPOILER: Show
